programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Shanghai Jumping - Against The Clock With Jump Off
programme.desc: Held at the Shanghai Juss International Equestrian Centre, featuring CSI5* show jumping with fences up to 1.60m. The schedule includes the Global Champions League team competition and the Grand Prix, with riders earning points toward the season standings. Technical courses emphasize combinations and time allowed on a compact arena.

programme.title: Freiburg vs Aston Villa - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. This is the second season played under a new format, which replaced the 32-team group stage with a 36-team league phase. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.desc: The UEFA Conference League is the third-tier club football tournament organised by UEFA. The new format competition runs for its second season live and exclusive only on beIN. The RB Arena in Leipzig, Germany, is the venue for the Conference League final on 27 May 2026.

programme.desc: Five-ton race trucks storm the 4.185 km Bugatti Circuit in four combative sprints. programme.desc: Highlights from the Miami P1, held in Miami, USA, from 22–29 March. programme.title: Argentina vs Switzerland - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Quarter-final 4
programme.desc: Argentina have won both of their FIFA World Cup games against Switzerland, 2-0 in 1966 and 1-0 in 2014 in what was the last meeting between the sides in any competition. Switzerland have never beaten Argentina in seven attempts in all competitions. They’ve only faced Russia more often without ever winning in their history.

programme.desc: This will be the fourth meeting between USA and Bosnia and Herzegovina, with the Stars and Stripes unbeaten in the first three, all in friendlies from 2013 to 2021. USA have won just one of their last 21 FIFA World Cup meetings with UEFA nations, and are winless in their last 13 since a 3-2 victory over Portugal in 2002.

programme.title: Portugal vs Croatia - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Round Of 32
programme.desc: Portugal have lost just one of their 10 matches against Croatia across all competitions, whilst the Seleção are unbeaten in competitive matches against the nation, winning five of their six encounters. programme.title: Australia vs Egypt - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Round Of 32

programme.title: Colombia vs Ghana - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Round Of 32
programme.desc: This will be the first ever meeting between Colombia and Ghana. Colombia have won each of their last four FIFA World Cup matches against African nations, all by margins of exactly one goal. However, they were eliminated in their only previous knockout stage game against such opposition.

programme.title: Germany vs Curacao - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever encounter between Germany and Curaçao. Germany have won 14 of their last 17 FIFA World Cup matches against teams from the Americas. Germany have won the FIFA World Cup four times, the joint-most for a European nation alongside Italy. Overall, only Brazil have lifted the trophy on more occasions.

programme.title: Netherlands vs Japan - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Netherlands and Japan are meeting at the FIFA World Cup for the second time – their first encounter came in the 2010 group stage, where the Dutch won 1-0 with a goal from Wesley Sneijder. programme.title: Saudi Arabia vs Uruguay - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Saudi Arabia and Uruguay are meeting at the FIFA World Cup for the second time. Their first encounter came in the 2018 group stage, where Uruguay won 1-0 with a goal from Luis Suárez. Saudi Arabia have a balanced FIFA World Cup record against CONMEBOL teams, with one win and one defeat.

programme.title: Iran vs New Zealand - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Iran and New Zealand will meet at the FIFA World Cup for the first time. Their two previous encounters ended in a 0-0 draw and a 3-0 win for Iran. This will be Iran’s seventh appearance at the FIFA World Cup. They are yet to progress past the first round – only Scotland have made more appearances in the finals without making it past the first rou

programme.title: Brazil vs Haiti - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Brazil and Haiti will meet at the World Cup for the first time. Their three previous encounters all produced a Brazil victory, with the Seleção scoring 17 goals and conceding only one. programme.title: Netherlands vs Sweden - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Netherlands and Sweden will meet at the World Cup for the second time. Their first encounter, in the 1974 group stage, ended 0-0 and featured Johan Cruyff’s famous ‘Cruyff turn’ – one of 11 successful dribbles in the match, the joint-most by any player in a game at that tournament. programme.title: Final - FIFA World Cup 2026 - finals
programme.desc: All 104 matches from the FIFA World Cup 2026™ are broadcast live and exclusive on beIN SPORTS with a choice of Arabic, English and French studio and match commentary. The FIFA World Cup 2026™ will be the 23rd edition of the tournament and the first to feature 48 teams and three host countries: Canada, Mexico and the USA.
